case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. IVAN R. ANZUETO SOTO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-23-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CLAUDIA BARDALES--LEGAL ASSISTANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
